seo.title: Browser Extension Guide - Install AiBrand Plugin
seo.description: Step-by-step guide to install and use the AiBrand browser extension for automated social media content publishing and management.
seo.keywords: browser extension, plugin guide, installation guide, Chrome extension, social media automation, AiBrand

title: Browser Plugin Guide
introduction: This guide will walk you through how to install and use the AiBrand browser plugin, enabling you to manage your social media accounts and publish content more conveniently.

sections.manualInstallDesc: For GitHub or China Download channels

step1.title: Step 1: Open Plugin Management Dialog
step1.content: On the AiBrand platform page, click the plugin icon in the upper right corner to open the browser plugin management dialog.
step1.caption: Click the Extension button in the upper right corner

step2.title: Step 2: Download the Plugin
step2.content: Select the download method in the dialog and click to download the plugin.
step2.caption: Choose the appropriate download channel
step2.note: Difference between Chrome Web Store and GitHub Release installation:
step2.noteItem1: Plugins downloaded from GitHub Release require you to enable developer mode in your browser to install, but the resources installed here are the latest plugins.
step2.noteItem2: Plugins downloaded from Chrome Web Store can be installed directly.

step3.title: Step 3: Check Installation Status
step3.content: After installation, click the browser's extensions button to check if the installation was successful.
step3.caption: Find AiBrand plugin in browser extension bar

step4.title: Step 4: Enter Plugin Details Page
step4.content: If the installation is successful, click on the plugin to enter the plugin details page.

step5.title: Step 5: Authorize the Plugin
step5.notLoggedInContent: If you are not logged in on the AiBrand homepage, click "Go to Home" to go to the AiBrand homepage and log in.
step5.notLoggedInCaption: Click 'Go to Home' to log in first
step5.loggedInContent: If you are already logged in on the AiBrand homepage, click "Authorize Now" to authorize.
step5.loggedInCaption: Click 'Authorize Now' to authorize the plugin

step6.title: Step 6: Confirm Plugin is Ready
step6.content: Permission has been granted successfully. Next, open the AiBrand platform, refresh the page, and you will see the plugin is ready. Click on it to view details.
step6.caption2: Return to AiBrand platform to check plugin status

step7.title: Step 7: View Account Information
step7.content: If you have logged into the platforms supported by the plugin, you will see that the plugin has obtained the corresponding accounts.
step7.loginContent: Click the "Extension" button to view account login status. If it shows not logged in, please log in to the corresponding social media platform first.
step7.caption: Check Xiaohongshu account login status

step7b.title: Login Xiaohongshu Account
step7b.content: Click "Login Now" to jump to the Xiaohongshu page to log in. After logging in, you also need to log in to the Creator Center.
step7b.caption1: Quickly enter Creator Center from the upper right corner
step7b.caption2: After logging in, refresh the page to see the account is authorized
step7b.importantNoteContent: Xiaohongshu homepage and Creator Center need to be logged in separately. The plugin function can only be used normally after both are logged in.

step8.title: Step 8: Sync Accounts
step8.content: You can sync accounts to account management here. Click the [Sync] button, and the account will be synced to our database.
step8.caption: Click 'Sync' button to sync account

step9.title: View Sync Results
step9.content: Return to the AiBrand homepage and click "My Channels" to enter the account management page.
step9.caption1: Click 'My Channels' to enter account management
step9.caption2: You can see the Xiaohongshu account has been successfully synced

complete.title: Complete
complete.content: Now you can use the AiBrand platform normally!

manualInstall.tipContent: If you have successfully installed the plugin from Chrome Web Store, you can skip this section and go directly to the "Authorize Plugin" chapter.

step1.title: Enter Extensions Management Page
step1.content: Click the three-dot menu in the upper right corner of the browser, and click to enter "Manage Extensions" page.

step2.title: Enable Developer Mode
step2.content: In the upper right corner of the extensions page, enable "Developer mode".

step3.title: Find the Downloaded Plugin File
step3.content: Open your browser's download folder and find the downloaded .crx plugin package.

step4.title: Drag and Drop to Install Plugin
step4.content: Drag and drop the .crx plugin package to the extensions page.

step5.title: Confirm Installation
step5.content: In the pop-up dialog, click "Add extension" to confirm the installation.

q1.question: Why does the plugin still show not logged in after I logged into Xiaohongshu?
q1.answer: You may not have logged into the Xiaohongshu Creator Center. On the Xiaohongshu homepage, click the button in the upper right corner to quickly log into the Xiaohongshu Creator Center.
